subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The Ancient Beauty hath called thee from the precincts of the Most Great Prison, and addresseth thee by this blessed Name, unto which there is no equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی جمال قدم از شطر سجن اعظم ترا ندا فرمود و باین اسم مبارک لا عدل له ترا خطاب
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment
